title: Prioria joveri
intro: Prioria joveri is a species of plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the 'Jover's Guanacaste'. The health benefits of Prioria joveri include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, attributed to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Prioria joveri include isoflavones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. In traditional medicine, Prioria joveri is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, as well as extracts and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
taxonomy: Prioria joveri is a species of tree that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. This family includes other plants like the soapberry and the lychee. Prioria joveri is native to the tropical rainforests of South America, specifically in the countries of Brazil and Peru. The tree is characterized by its large, broad leaves and its unique fruit. It is classified as a species of flowering plant, specifically in the order Sapindales.
